title: Disposable Moulded Active Carbon FFP2 Mask
shortDescription: Active Carbon Pre-Filter for organic vapours & welding fumes. Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort. Heavy duty, tab mounted, head straps
description: Active Carbon Pre-Filter for organic vapours & welding fumes. Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort. Heavy duty, tab mounted, head straps

features: Active Carbon Pre-Filter for organic vapours & welding fumes
Low breathing resistance for increased wearer comfort
Heavy duty, tab mounted, head straps
An external aluminium adjustable nose clips
PP inner with no loose fibres
Soft foam nosepiece for comfort & custom fit
Contour face seal for performance & comfort
Exhalation valve reduces hot air build-up & provides easy breathing in hot & humid environments
Dolomite tested as per BSI, CE 690046
standards: Complies with BS EN 149:2001 + A1:2009 FFP2 OR NR D

media.altText: Disposable Moulded Active Carbon FFP2 Mask
